creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
There's a bug in 7.16 - [Discover] Context view doesn't work when there are encoded special chars in the id given by URL ( https://github.com/elastic/kibana/issues/122638 ), fixed in 7.17.0 ( https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/kibana/7.17/release-notes-7.17.0.html ).

Please update the port to upstream.
